gap_reason: The local corpus has MLCommons Storage benchmark-method and result-framework evidence, but no captured exact result artifact with the submission-specific fields needed for a measured benchmark claim. Bounded official GitHub API/raw probes for the MLCommons Storage v2.0 result repository failed in the shell sandbox with DNS resolution errors, so this task records a concrete blocked-source boundary and keeps exact product/provider benchmark submissions open.
